description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in tactical or paramilitary attire, featuring a fitted black vest with multiple pouches and straps, fingerless gloves, and reinforced elbow and knee pads. The figure wears a utility belt equipped with holsters and gear, suggesting readiness for urban or security operations. His pants are cargo-style, tucked into sturdy, high-ankle boots, and he has a communication device or headset around his neck. The figure's hair is medium-length and swept to one side, partially covering his forehead. The overall appearance is that of a prepared, professional operative, with a focus on functionality and protection. The clothing and accessories are detailed, with visible seams, fasteners, and layered textures.
description: A tactical adult male in black paramilitary gear with a utility vest, cargo pants, gloves, and boots, ready for urban operations. He has medium-length swept hair and carries various equipment on his belt.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tactical vest, gloves, utility belt, and facial features with hair swept to one side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the vest, holstered gear, and the layered structure of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the vest, belt pouches, and the back of the boots and hair.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the side profile of the equipment, gloves, and the overall silhouette.
attribute_clothing_type: tactical vest with multiple pouches, cargo pants, fingerless gloves, reinforced pads, utility belt, and high-ankle boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair swept to one side
